provisions.enacted_effect: Purpose and definitions for District closures, roads, sidewalks, armed forces, and the National Guard.

provisions.current_xml_comparison: No operative text appears in the branch note.
provisions.final_recommended_action: Preserve as note material only.

provisions.enacted_effect: Closure authority for armed forces and specified agencies, including the road-closure bar around the gun store.
provisions.target_or_non_target: target: /us/usc/t54 or another District-appropriate anchor; the prior Title 54 note anchor is only a placeholder.
provisions.source_evidence: The source says that when deployed in the district by the President, the armed forces may close public roads under the stated conditions.
provisions.current_xml_comparison: The current branch has only a boilerplate note at /us/usc/t54/s100101/b/2 and does not codify the closure rules as text.
provisions.final_recommended_action: Codify the closure authority as actual text or a concise note at an appropriate anchor.

provisions.enacted_effect: Permitted reasons for closures, a 24-hour limit, and citizen re-entry rules.
provisions.source_evidence: The source requires closures to be for public health, safety, national security, or similar reasons.
provisions.current_xml_comparison: The current note does not implement the closure-limit rules.
provisions.final_recommended_action: Codify the limitation rules as actual text rather than a bare note.
